query:
ALTER TABLE campaigns ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS spend NUMERIC(12,2) DEFAULT 0;
UPDATE campaigns SET spend = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cm.spend),0) FROM campaign_metrics cm WHERE cm.campaign_id = campaigns.id);
